title: mimosa distans var. elongata
intro: Mimosa distans var. elongata, also known as Mimosa hostilis, is a plant species native to South America and parts of Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is rich in a compound called DMT, which has been associated with various health benefits, including reduced anxiety and improved mood. Mimosa hostilis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is often used in traditional medicine and shamanic rituals.
